spec.name: A Cave Passageway
spec.description: This is a T-intersection in the cave passageway, the north leading back towards the cave's entrance (you think!), the west leading towards a well-lighted area. Eastwards the passageway continues into the shadowy recesses of the mountain uninvitingly. The echoes of voices are confusing you a bit, and you are not sure whether you should try to remain quiet or not.
